item.title: Intrinsic is joining Google to advance physical AI in robotics
item.description: Intrinsic originally spun out from Google parent Alphabet in 2021, and it has since worked with Alphabet subsidiaries. The post Intrinsic is joining G...

item.title: Physical AI startup RLWRLD raises $26M
item.description: RLWRLD said it is executing proof-of-concept and robotics transformation projects with enterprise partners in Japan and South Korea. The post Physical...

item.title: Teledyne FLIR launches Lepton XDS thermal/visual camera module
item.description: Teledyne FLIR OEM has designed its Lepton XDS compact thermal and visible camera for space- and power-constrained products. The post Teledyne FLIR lau...

item.description: Design for manufacturing, or DFM, is a key part of bringing a robot from an idea to a prototype and ultimately to a finished, commercially available p...
